meta.phase: Phase 22 — Coverage Change Detection: Initial Baseline
meta.purpose: Establishes the evidence baseline snapshot for all 9 B-1/B-2 plans as of the research date. Future research passes compare against this baseline to detect added/removed benefits, coverage reductions, or coverage improvements. All future change_report files reference this baseline.
meta.disclaimer: Baseline reflects documents obtained during Phases 13-14. Document versions noted per plan. Changes detected against THIS baseline only — not against pre-2026 policy history.

known_change_events.description: WorldTrips transitioned from Lloyd's of London underwriter to TMHCC (Tokio Marine HCC) for all Atlas Series products and VisitorSecure. Policies sold in Florida: Houston Casualty Company (HC). All other locations: TMHCC (CI) Insurance SPC Ltd.
coverage_changes: Restricted countries list now follows TMHCC Noted Countries and Territories list
New purchase location restrictions added (Australia, Canada, NY, WA, MD, EEA countries)
known_change_events.impact_on_evidence_files: HIGH — any Certificate PDFs obtained before 2025-05-29 are from the old Lloyd's carrier and apply only to pre-transition policies. New policies issued after 2025-05-29 are governed by TMHCC Certificate. Re-download required.
known_change_events.action_required: DOWNLOAD new TMHCC Certificate of Insurance for Atlas America and VisitorSecure. Verify all Phase 14 evidence entries against new Certificate.

known_change_events.description: Trawick launched new trip cancellation products (Pathway Essential, Pathway Plus, Pathway Premium). These are trip cancellation plans — NOT visitor health insurance. No impact on Safe Travels USA Comprehensive coverage.
CoverAmerica Gold Master Policy effective date confirmed as October 2, 2024. This is a routine policy renewal — no specific benefit changes identified.
known_change_events.impact_on_evidence_files: LOW — confirms Certificate obtained is current. Verify Certificate version matches October 2024 effective date.
known_change_events.action_required: Confirm Certificate file date matches October 2024 effective date. Flag if Certificate in raw_documents/ predates this.

high_risk_items: Coinsurance schedule — any reduction from 90%/100% split
Acute onset maximum — any cap introduction
Pre-certification penalty — any increase above 50%
Age 80+ maximum — currently $10K, only 1 plan in market at this level
100% coinsurance — any reduction to 90% would be a material downgrade
Non-US citizen $1M acute onset cap — unique in market, monitor for reduction
Pre-cert penalty — unique severity in market at 50%

key_benefit_snapshot.border_entry_protection: Yes — non-refundable trip costs if denied entry at US border

high_risk_items: COVID coverage — plan explicitly covers COVID; monitor for re-exclusion
Border Entry Protection benefit — unique differentiator; monitor for removal
Cardiac/stroke sub-limit — $36K is already low; any further reduction is material
Returning customer discount — marketing-level data, verify from Certificate

key_benefit_snapshot.hypertension_treatment: Classified as cardiac condition — $25K sub-limit applies

high_risk_items: Cardiac/stroke sub-limits — Indian travelers with hypertension heavily affected by any reduction
Hypertension classification as cardiac — monitor for definition clarification
Age 70-79 and 80+ acute onset totals — already low vs competitors
FirstHealth network — any switch to smaller network materially impacts usability
watch_for: Trawick product restructuring (new Pathway products are different line — monitor if Safe Travels line is affected)

plan_baselines.carrier: TMHCC (CI) Insurance SPC Ltd [post-2025-05-29] / Lloyd's of London [pre-2025-05-29]

baseline_document.document_notes: CRITICAL: Verify Certificate version is post-2025-05-29 TMHCC version, NOT Lloyd's version

key_benefit_snapshot.plan_type: Scheduled benefit (fixed dollar amounts per service)
key_benefit_snapshot.acute_onset_criterion: Criterion (a): Acute onset does NOT directly or indirectly relate to a chronic condition
key_benefit_snapshot.claims_deadline: 60 days from last day of Certificate period

high_risk_items: CARRIER CHANGE (CE-001) — new TMHCC Certificate must be obtained and all Phase 14 evidence re-verified
Home Country Coverage — CONFIRMED REMOVED as of May 29 2025
Acute onset criterion (a) — 'does not relate to chronic condition' — broader exclusion than competitors; monitor for any liberalization
Scheduled benefit amounts — any reduction in fixed dollar amounts is a material coverage reduction
60-day Certificate-end deadline — unique in market; monitor for extension to standard 90-day service-date basis
change_monitoring.action_required_before_ranking: Re-download TMHCC Certificate. Verify all evidence.json entries against TMHCC version. Flag any entries from Lloyd's Certificate as superseded.

plan_baselines.carrier: TMHCC (CI) Insurance SPC Ltd [post-2025-05-29] / Lloyd's of London [pre-2025-05-29]

baseline_document.document_notes: CRITICAL: Verify Certificate version is post-2025-05-29 TMHCC version. Atlas America Certificate not yet obtained (Phase 13-14 open item). NEEDS MANUAL REVIEW.

key_benefit_snapshot.note: Full benefit snapshot requires TMHCC Certificate — not yet obtained

high_risk_items: CARRIER CHANGE (CE-001) — TMHCC Certificate must be obtained before any ranking
Home Country Coverage — CONFIRMED REMOVED as of May 29 2025
All Atlas America evidence entries are UNVERIFIED pending TMHCC Certificate
change_monitoring.action_required_before_ranking: Obtain TMHCC Atlas America Certificate of Insurance. Build evidence.json from TMHCC Certificate, not Lloyd's.

baseline_document.document_notes: Certificate of Insurance not obtained — evidence built from Policy Wording (L2)

key_benefit_snapshot.preexisting_definition: Reasonably prudent person standard — no fixed lookback
key_benefit_snapshot.stable_medication_exception: Conditions managed by stable medication (no change in type/frequency/quantity for 24 months) = NOT pre-existing
key_benefit_snapshot.cancer_exclusion: Absolute — cancer not covered under any circumstance
key_benefit_snapshot.precertification: Required for non-emergency hospital admissions (CONFIRMED from search results)

high_risk_items: Stable medication exception — the single most differentiating clause in the database; monitor for tightening or removal
Pre-ex direct coverage limits ($25K-$50K) — monitor for reduction
90-day minimum plan — any extension would reduce flexibility
Cancer exclusion — confirm remains in new policy versions (limits use case but is consistent)
Crum & Forster SPC financial ratings
change_monitoring.action_required_before_ranking: Obtain Certificate of Insurance (L1) to upgrade evidence from L2 Policy Wording.

plan_baselines.carrier: Crum & Forster SPC via ITI SP

key_benefit_snapshot.criterion_f: Chronic conditions with expected episodes or flare-ups excluded from acute onset

high_risk_items: Criterion (f) — explicit chronic condition bar for acute onset; monitor for any relaxation
PT exclusion — explicit; monitor for reinstatement (Choice already includes PT)
Dual PPO network (UHC + PHCS) — unique advantage; monitor if PHCS removed
Age 80+ coverage gap — no acute onset coverage for any condition; monitor for restoration

plan_baselines.carrier: Crum & Forster SPC via ITI SP

key_benefit_snapshot.criterion_f: Same chronic condition bar as Basic

high_risk_items: PT benefit ($50/visit, 10 visits) — only non-IMG plan with PT; monitor for reduction
Cardiac acute onset at $50K vs Basic $25K — monitor if gap narrows
Age 80+ acute onset gap — same as Basic; monitor for age extension

immediate_re_research_required: Any plan's Certificate of Insurance document gets a new effective date
Any carrier financial rating drops below A- (AM Best) or BBB+ (S&P)
Any carrier is acquired, renamed, or exits the US visitor insurance market
Any carrier announces withdrawal from specific visa categories or age groups
quarterly_review_items: WorldTrips TMHCC Certificate for Atlas America and VisitorSecure — obtain post-May 2025 versions
INF Elite X Certificate of Insurance — obtain L1 document to replace L2 Policy Wording evidence
Safe Travels USA Comprehensive — confirm claims deadline from Certificate
All plans — verify benefit dollar amounts unchanged from baseline snapshot
annual_review_items: Re-crawl all Phase 11 Priority 1-3 sources for new plans
Check for any new B-1/B-2 compatible plans launched by carriers
Verify all carrier financial ratings still strong
Run full claim simulation refresh against updated Certificates
